checked_dimensions.name: spec_compliance
checked_dimensions.evidence: The implementation adds a governed branch cleanup policy draft and a deterministic specbridge-branch-cleanup-policy evaluator that classifies branch refs without authorizing cleanup.

checked_dimensions.name: acceptance_criteria
checked_dimensions.evidence: The policy draft declares draft status, enforcement=none, cleanup_permission=none, candidate classes, hard blocks, required gates, future activation requirements, blocked commands, and blocked actions. The CLI command emits policy metadata, totals, candidate counts, blocked counts, future gates, branch evaluations, read-only notes, and explicit output path behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: policy_boundaries
checked_dimensions.evidence: All changed files are inside issue-215 exclusive_write scope. The implementation does not touch workflows, env files, secrets, dependencies, production, billing, authentication, authorization, database, CI/CD security, operator decisions, issue #194, digital twin work, or branch cleanup behavior.

checked_dimensions.name: security_rules
checked_dimensions.evidence: The command uses repository path normalization, writes only the governed policy evaluation artifact when explicitly requested, reads local branch inventory only, performs no network calls, and performs no branch mutation.

checked_dimensions.name: changed_file_scope
checked_dimensions.evidence: The changed source, docs, dashboard, state, inventory, policy, contract, scope, final report, audit packet, and ChatGPT audit files are all declared in issue-215 scope.

checked_dimensions.name: test_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: The CLI regression suite includes branch cleanup policy coverage for command shape, deterministic repeated output, required fields, enforcement_status=none, required future gates, cleanup_permission=none per branch evaluation, no mutation without -OutputPath, output artifact writing, -Force replacement behavior, bad OutputPath rejection, and artifact family registration.

checked_dimensions.name: ci_evidence
checked_dimensions.evidence: Local validation evidence is tracked in the audit packet, including a passing full smoke run. GitHub CI remains the authoritative remote gate after PR creation.

checked_dimensions.name: final_report_honesty
checked_dimensions.evidence: The final report records changed files, passing local validation status, policy result, risk result, unresolved CI and closure risks, merge status, deployment status, and completion status.

findings.evidence: The branch cleanup policy documentation states that no branch cleanup is authorized and that all branch entries keep cleanup_permission=none.
findings.recommendation: Keep cleanup permission disabled unless a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize branch cleanup.

unresolved_risks: GitHub CI pending until PR creation.
Post-merge closure still required after primary merge.
Actual branch cleanup remains blocked until a future dedicated policy and execution contract authorize it.
